name: kitchen
hints: The kitchen has an oven and a dumb-waiter. Both are important mechanics.
The oven leads to the solar oven room. The dumb-waiter moves between floors - use it to access other areas.
GO OVEN to find the solar oven with a nail file. GO DUMB-WAITER to ride it to other floors.
GO OVEN leads to room 15 (solar oven, nail file). The dumb-waiter (room 20) connects to the pantry and workroom. EAST returns to hall.
notes: Kitchen with oven (leads to solar oven room 15) and dumb-waiter (room 20, connects to pantry and workroom). EAST returns to the hall (room 11).
